apiKey.description: Resend API key. Falls back to RESEND_API_KEY when unset.
Resend API key. Falls back to RESEND_API_KEY when unset.
Resend API key. Falls back to RESEND_API_KEY when unset.

resend:index:ApiKey.description: A Resend API key. API key changes are replaced because Resend does not support updates.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was created.

domainId.description: Optional domain ID that restricts this API key to a single domain.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was last used, if any.

name.description: Display name for the API key.

permission.description: API key permission: full_access or sending_access.

token.description: Secret API key token returned only when the key is created.

domainId.description: Optional domain ID that restricts this API key to a single domain.
